title: T-069 — Docs: TEC-092 ECO Phase-2 marker (Phase 1 out-of-scope)
prompt: Add a Phase-2 marker note for TEC-092 ECO (Engineering Change Order) per §7A + §4.4 line 108. Output: design/specs/TEC-092-eco-phase2.md confirming that the ECO prototypes (eco_screen, eco_change_request_modal, eco_approval_modal) are tracked for traceability but are explicitly OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1. Include hand-off pointers for the Phase-2 backlog.

pipeline_inputs.description: Phase-2 marker note for ECO so prototypes are not orphaned.
pipeline_inputs.details: Note links the three ECO prototypes (eco_screen, eco_change_request_modal, eco_approval_modal) and the §4.4 exclusion. Include suggested Phase-2 acceptance criteria scaffolding for future re-decomposition.
acceptance_criteria: Given the note exists, when reviewed, then it confirms ECO is Phase-2 and lists the three prototypes.
Given the note, when planning Phase-2, then it provides scaffolding for re-decomposition.
risk_red_lines: Do not draft Phase-1 ECO tasks.
